mapper.select:
SELECT H.HOTEL_ID AS hotelId, H.HOTEL_NAME AS hotelName, H.LOCATION AS location, H.HOTEL_TYPE AS hotelType, H.PRICE_PER_NIGHT AS pricePerNight, NVL(ROUND((SELECT AVG(RATING) FROM TRV_HOTEL_REVIEW WHERE HOTEL_ID = H.HOTEL_ID), 1), H.RATING) AS rating, H.DESCRIPTION AS description, H.IMAGE_PATH AS imagePath FROM TRV_HOTEL H
AND H.LOCATION LIKE '%' || #{location} || '%'
AND H.HOTEL_TYPE = #{hotelType}
ORDER BY rating DESC

SELECT HOTEL_ID AS hotelId, HOTEL_NAME AS hotelName, LOCATION AS location, HOTEL_TYPE AS hotelType, PRICE_PER_NIGHT AS pricePerNight, RATING AS rating, DESCRIPTION AS description, IMAGE_PATH AS imagePath FROM TRV_HOTEL WHERE HOTEL_ID = #{hotelId}

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT H.HOTEL_ID AS hotelId, H.HOTEL_NAME AS hotelName, H.LOCATION AS location, H.HOTEL_TYPE AS hotelType, H.PRICE_PER_NIGHT AS pricePerNight, NVL(ROUND((SELECT AVG(RATING) FROM TRV_HOTEL_REVIEW WHERE HOTEL_ID = H.HOTEL_ID), 1), H.RATING) AS rating, H.DESCRIPTION AS description, H.IMAGE_PATH AS imagePath FROM TRV_HOTEL H ORDER BY rating DESC ) WHERE ROWNUM <= #{limit}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO TRV_HOTEL (HOTEL_ID, HOTEL_NAME, LOCATION, HOTEL_TYPE, PRICE_PER_NIGHT, RATING, DESCRIPTION) VALUES (TRV_HOTEL_SEQ.NEXTVAL, #{hotelName}, #{location}, #{hotelType}, #{pricePerNight}, #{rating}, #{description})
mapper.update: UPDATE TRV_HOTEL SET HOTEL_NAME = #{hotelName}, LOCATION = #{location}, HOTEL_TYPE = #{hotelType}, PRICE_PER_NIGHT = #{pricePerNight}, DESCRIPTION = #{description} WHERE HOTEL_ID = #{hotelId}
